title: juniperus vulgaris
intro: Juniperus vulgaris, also known as the common juniper, is a small evergreen shrub native to the Northern Hemisphere, belonging to the cypress family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like alpha-pinene and beta-pinene, known for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juniperus vulgaris include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and aiding in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Juniper berries, a key part of the plant, are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, with the herbal preparations also including essential oils, extracts, and dried berries.
